relationship_diagnostics.status_note: Raw close prices were aligned by timestamp; price, short-return and future-return correlations are diagnostics only. Scatter plots may be sampled for browser responsiveness; feature time-series plots use the full history.

items.name: feature timestamp <= event timestamp
items.detail: 0 rows have price_feature_time later than time.

items.name: rolling and shift direction
items.detail: CSV-level diagnostics cannot prove rolling implementation direction. Review source-level no-future-leakage tests and past-only rolling/asof code paths.
